reviews.comment:
El minimercado que hay en esta estación YPF ACA es famoso por los sandwiches que tienen pero ayer 01/03/2022 a las 14 horas no tenían pan por lo tanto no hay nada para comer ya que lo único que hacen son sandwiches.
Fue un día de recambio turístico que ellos conocen muy bien y no lo tuvieron en cuenta, yo regresaba a Buenos Aires así que hasta cañuelas no hay ningún lugar para comer.
Lo lamento por ellos ya que hace 27 años que voy 4 veses al año y desde ahora no le pido nunca más.

(Translated by Google)
The convenience store at this YPF ACA station is famous for its sandwiches, but yesterday, March 1st, 2022, at 2 PM, they were out of bread, so there was nothing to eat since they only make sandwiches.
It was a busy day for tourists, which they know very well, and they didn't take it into account. I was returning to Buenos Aires, so there's nowhere to eat until Cañuelas. I feel sorry for them because I've been going there four times a year for the last 27 years, and from now on, I'll never order from them again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXeFotSXpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Para un descanso en el viaje,comer al aire libre con todo lo que nos tiene acostumbrado el ACA con baños limpios y marketing de alimentos

For a break during your trip, enjoy an outdoor meal with all the amenities you've come to expect from the ACA, including clean restrooms and excellent food marketing.

reviews.comment:
Excelente los sandwich el de bondiola sabor ahumado un perfume espectacular ,generosos son para compartir , los baños limpios .

(Translated by Google)
The sandwiches are excellent, the pork shoulder sandwich has a smoky flavor and a spectacular aroma; they are generous and perfect for sharing. The bathrooms are clean.
